message:
feat(lax): support fft_lengths alias in rfft/irfft and fix split defaults

FFT param handling:
- Extract parse_optional_fft_length() helper to reduce duplication in
  eval_rfft and eval_irfft; it now accepts both "fft_length" (existing)
  and "fft_lengths" (JAX-style comma-separated list, last element used)
- Add tests: rfft_accepts_fft_lengths_alias, rfft_accepts_fft_lengths_list,
  irfft_accepts_fft_lengths_alias, irfft_accepts_fft_lengths_list

Split defaults:
- Make "axis" param optional in eval_split, defaulting to 0 when absent
  (previously always required, causing panics on JAX-emitted Jaxprs that
  omit the axis when splitting along axis 0)
- Make split produce a single section when neither "sizes" nor
  "num_sections" is present, matching JAX's no-arg split semantics
- Add tests: test_split_defaults_axis_to_zero,
  test_split_defaults_to_single_section_without_sizes_or_num_sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
